title: Kiln run state — .kiln/state.json
description: Deterministic PROJECTION of events.jsonl — never a source of truth. Rebuilt from the ledger by kiln-state.mjs project; on any mismatch the ledger wins. updated_at is the ts of the last folded event (not the wall clock), so projection is byte-deterministic: same events, same bytes.

schema.description: State schema version — v3 run state

stage.description: Current pipeline stage; bumped by stage_completed per the fixed stage-order table in kiln-state.mjs

posture.description: The Gauge's posture vector; null until posture_set. posture_escalated shallow-merges over it

capability.description: Capability-probe result; null until an event carries data.capability

claude_head.description: Resolved Claude council head — the SEAT engine (Fable 5 preferred, Opus 4.8 succession). OPTIONAL: absent on every pre-succession ledger (kiln-state.mjs validateState accepts a record without it); present, it is 'fable' or 'opus'. Not in required.

paths.description: Run-relevant artifact paths, shallow-merged from events' data.paths

updated_at.description: ts of the last folded event — deterministic, never the wall clock

last_event_seq.description: seq of the last folded event; validate cross-checks this against the ledger
